//: Used by `tsc` during `npm run build` (and only there).
Extends the base tsconfig.json with extra `paths` entries that route
@terbiumos/tfs to a local .d.ts shim — needed because the upstream
package's .d.ts re-exports types from its own .ts source, which has
errors that skipLibCheck does not suppress.
Vite still reads the base tsconfig.json so its bundler resolves the
real package at runtime via node_modules. See src/types/terbiumos-tfs.d.ts.
